problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
